queue_item.action: Lock the bounded browser capture adapter to the exact Event Timing and Long Animation Frames evaluators with explicit budget propagation and independent fail-closed integration tests.
required_evidence: explicit execution limit and falsification route

progress.finding: Combined acceptance is a logical conjunction over two independent production evaluators. Event Timing failure or inconclusiveness cannot be masked by a passing long-frame stream, and a long-frame violation cannot be masked by passing Event Timing evidence.
progress.verification: The committed test statically imports the production adapter and covers four cross-module contracts. No remote workflow run was observed and local network resolution prevented a clean-checkout execution, so no passing-test claim is made.

queue_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should add this integration test to its relevant gate, then use the adapter in a deployment-bound target-browser harness. Preserve both raw streams, support flags, zero-interactionId counts, declared budgets, independent verdicts, deployment identity, and repeated-trial identity.

canonical_queue_update_policy: Append-only team-owned update; operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
next_action: Wire the integration test into a repository CI gate and create the target-browser evidence packet schema binding source commit, deployment identity, device/browser identity, interaction window, raw observations, budgets, and repeated-trial comparison.
